scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && next dev --port ${FRONTEND_PORT:-3000}"
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:db && npm run dev
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npm run typecheck && cd ../frontend && npm run typecheck
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
